channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 57A: police operation
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: police operation. [On 15.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: police operation.
[On 15.06.2026]

item.title: 37: service obstruction because of police operation
item.description: service obstruction towards Schottentor U. expected duration: 11:10 o'clock . Reason: police operation in the Hohe Warte stop area. [On 15.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
service obstruction towards Schottentor U. expected duration: 11:10 o'clock . Reason: police operation in the Hohe Warte stop area.
[On 15.06.2026]

item.title: 1A: service disruption
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: service disruption. [On 15.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: service disruption.
[On 15.06.2026]

item.title: U3: service disruption
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: service disruption. [On 15.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: service disruption.
[On 15.06.2026]

item.title: Donaufelder Straße crossing with Plateau Theodor-Körner-Gasse and Plankenbüchlergasse
item.description: Vehicle traffic, including public transport, can be maintained in all existing driving relationships. [25.05.2026 – 26.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Vehicle traffic, including public transport, can be maintained in all existing driving relationships.
[25.05.2026 – 26.07.2026]

item.title: Hernals Hauptstraße from Redtenbachergasse and Schadinagasse to Julius-Meinl-Gasse
item.description: The pipe laying work (preparations for underground construction) will be carried out in the actual area of Hernals main road by day, night and sometimes also on weekends … [19.10.2025 – 03.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The pipe laying work (preparations for underground construction) will be carried out in the actual area of Hernals main road by day, night and sometimes also on weekends …
[19.10.2025 – 03.07.2026]

item.title: Schultheßgasse from crossing Halirschgasse and Gräffergasse from crossing Dittersdorfgasse and Fercher
item.description: The pipe laying work (preparations for underground construction) is generally carried out during the day and with the release of a minimum 3.00 m wide residual runway. [19.10.2025 – 03.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The pipe laying work (preparations for underground construction) is generally carried out during the day and with the release of a minimum 3.00 m wide residual runway.
[19.10.2025 – 03.07.2026]

item.title: Gräffergasse from crossing Halirschgasse and Schultheßgasse from crossing Heigerleinstraße
item.description: The pipe laying work (preparation for underground construction) is carried out in general at day, with the Gräffergasse from the Halirschgasse and Schultheßgasse up to the … [19.10.2025 – 03.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The pipe laying work (preparation for underground construction) is carried out in general at day, with the Gräffergasse from the Halirschgasse and Schultheßgasse up to the …
[19.10.2025 – 03.07.2026]

item.title: U5: Spitalgasse from 29 to 33
item.description: The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) is carried out during the day, blocking of the pavement and construction of a minimum 2.00 m wide … [11.01.2026 – 03.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) is carried out during the day, blocking of the pavement and construction of a minimum 2.00 m wide …
[11.01.2026 – 03.07.2026]

item.title: U5: Währinger Straße 40-42 to 54
item.description: The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) will be carried out at day and, if necessary, at night, at the time of 22:00 to 05:00 at … [11.01.2026 – 03.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The cable laying work (110 kV conversion as preliminary work for the U5) will be carried out at day and, if necessary, at night, at the time of 22:00 to 05:00 at …
[11.01.2026 – 03.07.2026]
